case_title: ABLE CREDIT SERVICES vs. DIMAPILIS, APOLONIO R. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $112.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABLE CREDIT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT DIMAPILIS, APOLONIO R.
